framework.name: Travel Planning Multi-Agent System
framework.description: Hypothetical example of A2A usage: personal assistant AI delegates to specialized travel agent AI for flight booking, which coordinates with hotel booking AI. Each agent uses MCP for tool access (flight/hotel APIs) while A2A manages inter-agent communication and task handoffs.
framework.raw_quote: If you're planning a trip, your personal assistant AI might use A2A to hand off flight booking to a specialized travel agent AI, which then coordinates with a hotel booking AI.
